steps.title: Spot the opening em-dash
steps.content: The sentence already includes an em-dash before assuming: indicate that—assuming solar panel installers' ______ practice has the potential... The aside opened by that dash needs a matching closing dash.

steps.title: Close the aside
steps.content:
Choice C supplies the matching em-dash: cooperation—this, which closes the parenthetical aside —assuming solar panel installers' cooperation— and lets the main clause this practice has the potential... resume cleanly.

Choice A omits punctuation; choice B substitutes a colon, which doesn't pair with the opening dash; choice D uses a comma, which is too weak to close the aside.

The answer is C.
